data.title: France Reports 77 Crypto-Linked Kidnapping and Extortion Cases So Far This Year
data.description:
France has recorded 77 cases so far this year involving crypto-linked kidnapping, unlawful detention, extortion, or attempted crimes, French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said.

According to NS3.AI, Nunez said the total is up from 45 in 2025.

He added that about 200 people were arrested following incidents or during preventive operations.

data.title: Mango Network to Unlock 286.87 Million MGO Tokens on July 9
data.description:
Mango Network is scheduled to unlock about 286.87 million MGO tokens at 9:00 AM (UTC+8) on July 9.

According to ChainCatcher, the information comes from token unlock data tracked by Web3 asset data platform RootData, which estimates the unlocked tokens are worth about $2.85 million.

data.title: STOCKS | BOE A Shares Rebound Into Positive Territory After Hitting Intraday Limit-Down
data.description:
BOE A shares rose before midday to trade in positive territory after earlier touching the intraday limit-down price.

According to Jin10, the stock had briefly hit its limit-down level during the morning session before reversing higher.

data.title: Cardano Wallet Provider SecondFi Launches Asset Recovery Wallet Check Tool After Security Incident Review
data.description:
Cardano wallet provider SecondFi has launched an asset recovery wallet check tool that lets users make an initial assessment of whether their wallets may have been affected.

According to Foresight News, SecondFi said the addresses currently shown in the tool are based on its preliminary review data related to a security incident and are not final.

SecondFi added that the displayed address list may be incomplete and may not represent a complete or final set of affected addresses.

data.title: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan Says Strategy’s Role in Bitcoin Market Has Shifted
data.description:
Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan said Strategy’s role in the Bitcoin market has undergone a major change, arguing that its long-running phase of one-way accumulation is likely over.

According to Odaily, Hougan said Strategy had for years been one of the most important Bitcoin buyers globally, consistently providing demand on the long side.

Hougan said Strategy is expected to trade Bitcoin more flexibly based on market conditions going forward, while not engaging in large-scale selling. He added that existing mechanisms would not force Strategy to sell billions of dollars’ worth of Bitcoin each year.

Hougan said that if Bitcoin enters a bull market, Strategy is still likely to return to being a net buyer. However, he said Strategy’s influence on the Bitcoin market in the next cycle is expected to be lower than in the previous cycle.

data.title: AI | UBS: 'Absolutely No Sign' of Let Up in AI Demand
data.description: UBS Wealth Management’s Hartmut Issel said the firm remains “slightly overweight” semiconductor stocks and sees “absolutely no sign of any let up” in overall demand for AI, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: Iron Ore Rises After CMRG Signals Possible Block on Some Fortescue Deliveries
data.description: Iron ore advanced, with futures briefly topping $100 a ton, after China’s state-backed buyer China Mineral Resources Group (CMRG) signaled it planned to restrict some Fortescue Ltd. inventories held at mainland ports, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: ENS Community Member Proposes Dissolving ENS DAO After Governance Disputes
data.description:
A member of the Ethereum Name Service (ENS) community has proposed that ENS DAO dissolve itself, citing what he described as a collapse in the organization’s governance.

According to ChainCatcher, The Defiant reported that Christoph Jentzsch posted on X urging ENS DAO to disband, destroy the ENSv2 Universal Router keys, and distribute remaining funds, with the goal of formally shifting ENS into a public infrastructure role.

Jentzsch, who wrote code for “The DAO” in 2016 and now runs Tokenize.it, said he holds no formal position in ENS governance.

The proposal follows recent governance controversy involving ENS co-founder Nick Johnson. The report said Johnson used roughly half of the protocol’s active voting power to unilaterally veto a vote to renew the Security Council. It also said that about two weeks earlier, Johnson self-delegated nearly half of the active voting power to support a separate proposal that would expand the ENS Foundation’s control over its treasury.

data.title: AI | Judge Orders Mediation in Musk-Altman Legal Fight Over AI Startups
data.description: A judge overseeing the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over their dueling AI startups has enlisted a mediator to try to resolve the dispute, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: Global Chip LOF (501225) Suspended Until 10:30 a.m. on July 2 After Premium to NAV Widens
data.description: Global Chip LOF (501225) will be suspended from market open on July 2, 2026 and resume trading at 10:30 a.m. the same day after its secondary-market price traded at a significant premium to its net asset value (NAV), according to Jiemian News. The fund said its July 1 closing price was 4.752 yuan per unit, versus an NAV of 3.6412 yuan as of June 29, 2026. During the suspension, the fund’s redemption business will continue as normal.

data.title: Binance Pay Promotion Will Offer 10% Bonus Credits on Linkex.ai Purchases for Up to 10,000 Users
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Binance Pay will run a promotion with linkex.ai that offers eligible Binance Pay users 10% bonus credits when purchasing platform credits on linkex.ai using Binance Pay. The promotion period is scheduled for 2026-07-02 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-08-01 23:59 (UTC). Binance said the offer is limited to the first 10,000 eligible users who complete a valid transaction during the promotion window, with eligibility determined on a first-come, first-served basis based on Binance’s and/or linkex.ai’s records. Transactions that are canceled, refunded, reversed, or otherwise deemed invalid will not qualify.

Promotion Details: Binance stated that eligible users who purchase platform credits on linkex.ai and complete payment using Binance Pay will receive 10% additional platform credits on qualified transactions. The announcement provided an example indicating that a purchase of 100 credits would result in 110 credits in total. Eligibility Requirements and Limits: Binance said only users who complete identity verification and confirm participation during the promotion period can qualify. The promotion is not available in multiple jurisdictions listed in the announcement, and Binance noted that products or features referenced may not be available in some regions. Reward Issuance and Validity: Binance said the bonus credits are issued and fulfilled by linkex.ai, and that linkex.ai bonus credits will be valid for 12 months from the date of issue.

data.title: STOCKS | China A-Share Stocks See Large Net Main-Fund Inflows and Outflows by 10:40 (UTC+8) on July 2, 2026
data.description:
China A-share data showed the top 10 stocks by net main-fund inflows and outflows as of 10:40 (UTC+8) on July 2, 2026. According to Jin10, China Resources New Energy ranked first in net main-fund inflows at 3.14 billion yuan.

Other leading net inflow names were Zijin Mining (865 million yuan), Talkweb Information (828 million yuan), BYD (665 million yuan), HKC Corp. (562 million yuan), Will Semiconductor (546 million yuan), Tianyu Digital Technology (536 million yuan), Yellow River Cyclone (514 million yuan), Sanhua Intelligent Controls (443 million yuan), and Huafeng Technology (408 million yuan).

On the outflow side, GigaDevice Semiconductor recorded the largest net main-fund outflow at 2.74 billion yuan. It was followed by Dongshan Precision (2.28 billion yuan), Eoptolink Technology (1.71 billion yuan), JCET Group (1.61 billion yuan), Taiji Industry (1.59 billion yuan), BOE A (1.36 billion yuan), East Money Information (1.18 billion yuan), Montage Technology (1.08 billion yuan), Shenzhen Kaifa Technology (1.05 billion yuan), and Huagong Tech (1.00 billion yuan).

data.title: KalshiData Says Kalshi’s June Notional Trading Volume Reached $32.6 Billion
data.description:
KalshiData said Kalshi’s notional trading volume reached $32.6 billion in June, marking a new record high.

According to Odaily, KalshiData said the June figure was nearly double the more than $17.0 billion in notional trading volume recorded in May.

KalshiData attributed the increase mainly to World Cup events.

data.title: DefiLlama Says DL News Has Been Taken Over by New Owner and Is No Longer Affiliated
data.description:
DefiLlama said the crypto media outlet DL News and related assets have been taken over by a new owner and are no longer affiliated with DefiLlama. According to Foresight News, DefiLlama made the statement in a post on X.

DefiLlama said there is no longer any subordinate relationship between the two parties. It added that it cannot verify any information about outreach conducted by the new owner and will not endorse any content published by DL News.

DefiLlama also said that future DL News content does not represent DefiLlama’s position.

data.title: India IPO Pipeline Hits Record as Big Firms Line Up
data.description:
India’s initial public offering pipeline has hit a record as large companies line up to list.

Bankers expect IPO activity to accelerate in the coming months, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: Lighter Integrates With Robinhood Wallet, Enabling Perpetual Futures and Tokenized Stock Trading
data.description:
Lighter said it has been integrated into Robinhood Wallet, allowing users to access in-app perpetual futures and tokenized stock trading supported by Lighter.

According to Odaily, Lighter announced the update in a post on X.

Lighter said users can use USDG as the base quote asset for these services through Robinhood Wallet.

data.title: Hyperliquid Trader Closes SK Hynix and Micron Long Positions After Sharp AI and Semiconductor Pullback
data.description:
A major trader on Hyperliquid closed all long positions in SK Hynix and Micron amid a steep overnight pullback in AI and semiconductor-related assets, after SKHX (SK Hynix) briefly fell below $1,500.

According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, monitoring data from Hyperinsight showed the largest SKHX long holder, identified as address 0x9dc, exited both MU and SKHX longs during the broad decline. The trader recorded a realized loss of $4.42 million on a single SKHX position and was reported as the address with the largest 24-hour drawdown in Hyperliquid’s U.S. stock trading.

The address was said to have entered a SK Hynix long at elevated levels about a week earlier, with an average entry price of $1,803 and a position size of $35.16 million.

After closing the positions today, the account’s $17.8 million in funds shifted entirely into a defensive stance with no open positions, and no subsequent trading activity has been observed so far. The address has accumulated losses of $6 million over the past seven days, but remains described as a key position holder in the semiconductor segment.

data.title: Grass Foundation Opens Rewards Portal for Phase 2 Bandwidth-Sharing Participants
data.description:
The Grass Foundation has launched a rewards inquiry portal for Phase 2 participants in its decentralized bandwidth-sharing network, allowing users to log in and view their estimated reward amounts. According to Foresight News, the rewards cover users who participated by sharing bandwidth during Phase 2 from Epoch 1 to Epoch 19, spanning October 14, 2024, to June 8, 2026.

Rewards will be distributed in USDC. Claims will open starting July 22 at 9:00 PM (UTC+8) and will remain available until the deadline of January 22, 2027.

The report said any rewards not claimed by the deadline will be retained by Grass.

data.title: STOCKS | SK Hynix Plans 72.7 Billion Won Investment in Cheongju for NAND and Advanced Packaging
data.description:
SK hynix CEO Kwak Noh-jung said on July 2 that the company plans to invest 72.7 billion won in Cheongju to expand its NAND production and advanced packaging facilities. According to Odaily, he made the remarks at a public report meeting on the vision for advanced industrial development in the Chungcheong region.

Kwak said SK hynix will allocate 58.2 billion won to the M17 plant, which produces NAND, and 14.5 billion won to the P&T7 advanced packaging plant.

The M17 project is scheduled to begin construction next year, with production targeted for the first half of 2029. The P&T7 facility is planned for completion by the end of 2027.

data.title: Global Appetite for Korea Grows Ahead of 24-Hour Won Trading
data.description: Global investors’ interest in South Korea’s economy and capital markets has “clearly changed” for the better in recent years, the country’s top finance ministry official said, as the won prepares to shift to round-the-clock trading on July 6, according to Bloomberg.
